TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tingalaw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 150 buwan, 398 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 367 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 31 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 88%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tingalaw hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tingalaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tingalaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tingalaw hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Tingalaw hya' ga pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tay mkraya' na Tingalaw hya' ga Malaloong. tay mkyahu' na Tingalaw hya' ga Fakong. pqwasan maki qu ngasal bziran, "Tingalaw kyokay". rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tingalaw ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tiŋalaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. taj mkrajaʔ na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa malalooŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa *akoŋ. pqwas~ɕan maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, "tiŋalaw kjokaj". rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tiŋalaw ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tingalaw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 150 buwan, 398 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 367 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 31 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 88%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tingalaw hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tingalaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tingalaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tingalaw hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Tingalaw hya' ga pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tay mkraya' na Tingalaw hya' ga Malaloong. tay mkyahu' na Tingalaw hya' ga Fakong. pqwasan maki qu ngasal bziran, "Tingalaw kyokay". rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tingalaw ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tiŋalaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. taj mkrajaʔ na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa malalooŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tiŋalaw ħjaʔ ɣa *akoŋ. pqwas~ɕan maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, "tiŋalaw kjokaj". rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tiŋalaw ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
